acceptedAnswer.text: The Bio-Wellness Pod is an advanced wellness device that integrates quantum energy principles, PEMF, and other modalities to promote holistic healing and cellular repair.

mainEntity.name: What are the benefits of cryotherapy products?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our cryotherapy products combine hot and cold therapy with exercise to accelerate recovery, reduce inflammation, and enhance circulation.

mainEntity.name: How do hyperbaric chambers support health?

acceptedAnswer.text: Hyperbaric chambers deliver 100% pure oxygen at higher pressures, enhancing oxygen delivery to tissues for faster recovery and reduced inflammation.

mainEntity.name: What features do massage chairs offer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our zero gravity massage chairs feature multiple massage mechanisms, air-cell compression, heated rollers, and Bluetooth speakers for ultimate relaxation.
